title: ocimum tubiforme
intro: Ocimum tubiforme is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, commonly known as purple basils or purple mint, native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocimum tubiforme include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve cognitive function. Ocimum tubiforme can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and essential oil, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
